name: Ai Hoshino || SHOOTING STARS
description:
✶ | For me, lying is a form of love.

| SHOOTING STARS SERIES |

Welcome everyone to my first ever attempt at creating a series bot ( つ ≧ ▽ ≦ ) つ!! Oshi no Ko is probably one of my favorite anime series right now and Ai…well Ai just deserved a lot better overall. Which is why I’m making this bot because why not? Anyways, your reviews are highly appreciated!* *The following bots in this series will likely be Ruby Hoshino, Kana Arima, and Akane Kurokawa! If you’d like any other OnK characters then I’ll be happy to oblige!* *If there’s any flaws or problems with the bot, then let me know in the reviews! I don’t mind going back and editing it to make the experience as best as I can.*
creator: fadedgenesis
